title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people in a library. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: Two students are looking for books in a library. One student is taking a book from a shelf and the other is holding several books. There are tall bookshelves and tables around them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people taking a train. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A mother and her son are standing on a railway platform with their suitcases. They are looking at a train which has stopped at the station. There are other passengers and a large station clock nearby.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
